title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 67.5110 - Citation of law, purpose
text:
67.5110.  Citation of law, purpose. — Sections 67.5110 to 67.5121 shall be known and may be cited as the "Uniform Small Wireless Facility Deployment Act", which is intended to encourage and streamline the deployment of small wireless facilities and to help ensure that robust and dependable wireless radio-based communication services and networks are available throughout Missouri, which is a matter of legitimate statewide concern, by adopting a uniform statewide framework for the deployment of small wireless facilities and the utility poles to which they are attached consistent with sections 67.5110 to 67.5121 and sections 67.1830 to 67.1846.
(L. 2018 H.B. 1991) 
Effective 1-01-19
Expires 12-31-29; see § 67.5122
